mapper.insert: insert into t_scm_inbound (indate, barcode , ymdhms, cucode, cname, itemcode, bdate, seq, qty, scmmex, type, pbarcode) values ( #{date}, #{barcode}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{cucode}, #{cname}, #{itemcode}, #{bdate}, #{seq}, #{qty}, #{scmmex}, #{type}, #{pbarcode})
mapper.select:
select barcode from t_scm_inbound WHERE barcode IN
#{barcode}

select barcode from t_scm_barcode WHERE barcode IN
#{barcode}
